title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF BUNGOG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ECHAGUE, PROVINCE OF ISABELA, TO MABUHAY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1743 / 57 OG No. 4, 626 (January 23, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2747, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF BUNGOG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ECHAGUE, PROVINCE OF ISABELA, TO MABUHAY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Bungog in the Municipality of Echague, Province of Isabela, is changed to Mabuhay.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
